translations.en: qLeodon
translations.zh: 黎奧頓

translations.en: a woman with a slightly seaworn look, but delicate hands.
translations.zh: 一名略帶海風蝕痕、雙手卻仍纖細的女子。

translations.en: "Yes, $P?"
"Not now, $G!" She ducks a punch. "I'm busy!"
translations.zh: 「現下不行，$G！」她閃過一拳。「我正忙！」

translations.en: "A good $T to you, $G. Come, have a seat and talk with us a while."
translations.zh: 「$G，$T 安。來，坐下與我等敘敘。」

translations.en: "I'm @Captain Leodon."
translations.zh: 「我乃@Captain（船長）頓船長。」

translations.en: "I'm captain of the @Golden @Hind."
translations.zh: 「我為@Golden（金鹿）@Hind（號）之船長。」

translations.en: "She's the finest ship I've ever had the pleasure of @sailing 'cross the briny deep."
translations.zh: 「她乃我此生@sailing（航行）於茫茫鹹海之上、所遇最佳之船。」

translations.en: "Life on the @sea is the only life for me."
translations.zh: 「@sea（海）上生涯乃我唯一所歸之命途。」

translations.en: "Alas, the Hind needs serious @repairs just now."
translations.zh: 「惜哉，金鹿號目下急需@repairs（修繕）。」

translations.en: "Yes, I must keep myself occupied on land, meantime."
translations.zh: 「是的，這期間我須在陸上找事消遣。」

translations.en: "Perhaps I could @join thy party for a time."
translations.zh: 「或我可暫@join（入伙）與汝同行一陣。」

translations.en: "Ah, the sea. 'Tis as vast as a thousand @dreams."
translations.zh: 「啊，那片海。猶千百@dreams（夢境）之浩瀚。」

translations.en: "Indeed."
translations.zh: 「正是。」

translations.en: "You wouldn't be talking about Captain @John, would you?"
translations.zh: 「汝所提者，莫非是@John（約翰）船長？」

translations.en: "You wouldn't be talking about Captain @John, would you?"
translations.zh: 「汝所提者，莫非是@John（約翰）船長？」

translations.en: When you say 'Captain,' all the pirates at the table turn to you expectantly.
translations.zh: 汝一說「船長」，桌邊海盜眾人皆殷殷望汝。

translations.en: When they realize you weren't talking to them, they return to their business.
translations.zh: 見汝並非與彼等交談，眾人重又各做各事。

translations.en: "Aye, Leonna is the best first mate I've ever had."
translations.zh: 「嗯，里歐娜乃我所遇最佳之大副。」

translations.en: Leonna blushes and looks away, embarassed.
translations.zh: 里歐娜面赧，難為情地別過頭去。

translations.en: "Comes from being a captain once herself, you know."
translations.zh: 「畢竟她自己也曾為船長一名。」

translations.en: "That scallawag?"
translations.zh: 「那個無賴？」

translations.en: "He went down to the other side of the world to join up with the @gargoyles, the dirty traitor..."
translations.zh: 「他竟去了世界另一端，投靠@gargoyles（魔像族）族，這骯髒的叛徒……」

translations.en: The tea-drinker interrupts. "No, no, you've got it all wrong!"
translations.zh: 啜茶之人打斷：「不，不，汝全弄錯了！」

translations.en: "I can tell you the truth about Captain John!"
translations.zh: 「我可告知汝關於約翰船長之真相！」

translations.en: "Vile creatures, they are."
translations.zh: 「卑劣之種，正是。」

translations.en: "One of them attacked  my ship once. He flew off with a @ham before anyone could stop him."
translations.zh: 「曾有一隻襲我之船，未及阻攔便銜走一隻@ham（火腿）飛去。」

translations.en: "Yes, he stole my ham, and I dined on @biscuits that night."
translations.zh: 「正是，他偷了我的火腿，當晚我只得啃@biscuits（餅乾）果腹。」

translations.en: "That's right."
translations.zh: 「正是如此。」

translations.en: "Back to our quest, eh $G?"
translations.zh: 「回去辦正事吧，$G？」

translations.en: "Drop by again next time you're in town."
translations.zh: 「下次來城時再順道一訪。」

translations.en: "I can't help you with that."
translations.zh: 「此事我幫不上忙。」

translations.en: "I'd be glad to join you--but I have already!"
translations.zh: 「我自當樂意入伙——但我已在汝隊中啦！」

translations.en: "The Golden Hind won't be repaired for months, at the soonest."
translations.zh: 「金鹿號最快也得數月方能修妥。」

translations.en: "Traveling with you would likely prove interesting."
translations.zh: 「與汝同行，料是頗有意思。」

translations.en: "Would you like me to come along?"
translations.zh: 「汝願讓我同行嗎？」

translations.en: "Okay. I'll be here if you change your mind."
translations.zh: 「好。汝若改主意，我仍在此處。」

translations.en: "Not while you're in that thing!"
translations.zh: 「汝乘那玩意兒可不行！」

translations.en: "You have enough travelling with you already."
translations.zh: 「汝隨行之人已夠多了。」

translations.en: "But if you ask one of them to @leave first, I'd be happy to join you."
translations.zh: 「但汝若先請其中一人@leave（離隊），我便樂意入伙。」

translations.en: "Very well. This should make a nice change from my usual routine."
translations.zh: 「甚好。此可讓我換換口味。」

translations.en: "You might ask @Leonna if she would like to join us as well."
translations.zh: 「汝可順問@Leonna（里歐娜）娜願否同行。」

translations.en: "I'd have to @join you before I could leave, silly!"
translations.zh: 「我得先@join（入伙）才能離隊，傻孩子！」

translations.en: "Let's get our feet back on solid ground first, okay?"
translations.zh: 「先讓我等腳踏實地再說，可好？」

translations.en: "Okay. I think I'll head back to the Fallen Virgin, then."
translations.zh: 「那好，我便回墜貞酒館去吧。」

translations.en: "Here's all the equipment I was carrying, if you need it."
translations.zh: 「這是我隨身全部裝備，汝若需用便拿去。」

translator_notes: Leodon = 海盜船船長（女），可加入隊伍。Golden Hind 沿用 Drake 經典船名譯。Fallen Virgin 是 Buc's Den 酒館。
